name: Subtraction Underflow
description: Subtraction where the right operand can exceed the left, producing a negative result when a non-negative result is expected.
smt2Template:
(declare-const {{left}} Int)
(declare-const {{right}} Int)
(declare-const result Int)
(assert (= result (- {{left}} {{right}})))
(assert (>= {{left}} 0))
(assert (>= {{right}} 0))
(assert (> {{right}} {{left}}))
(assert (< result 0))
(check-sat)

teachingExample.explanation: withdraw subtracts amount from balance with no underflow guard
teachingExample.smt2:
(declare-const balance Int)
(declare-const amount Int)
(declare-const result Int)
(assert (= result (- balance amount)))
(assert (>= balance 0))
(assert (> amount balance))
(assert (< result 0))
(check-sat)

smt2ProofTemplate:
(declare-const {{left}} Int)
(declare-const {{right}} Int)
; Guard: path condition ensures {{right}} <= {{left}}
(assert (<= {{right}} {{left}}))
; Can {{right}} exceed {{left}}?
(assert (> {{right}} {{left}}))
(check-sat)
; unsat → proven: guard prevents underflow
